# EntityContainerAccessEventOptions Interface

> [!CAUTION]
> This interface is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

Options used to filter entity container access events.

## Properties

### **accessSourceFilter**
`accessSourceFilter?: ContainerAccessSourceFilter;`

If present will filter which container access sources can trigger the event.

Type: [*ContainerAccessSourceFilter*](ContainerAccessSourceFilter.md)

### **entityFilter**
`entityFilter?: EntityFilter;`

If present will filter which entity containers can trigger the event.

Type: [*EntityFilter*](EntityFilter.md)
